content_of_post_to_comment:
I'm so freaking cooked like I have so much work to do but I can't start working/studying,, any time I try, I just go back to sitting on my bed and scrolling, drawing, or doing anything BUT MY WORK. I'D SPEND HOURS ranting to people / pondering why I'm the way that I am instead of actually freaking starting what matters.

I know a lot of you might struggle similarly, hence why we're on this subreddit, but you guys understand me... If any way you deal with this, can you share me some advice ??? ?

I'm actually reaching a breaking point I've been like this for so long which is why i'm freaking posting on freaking reddit and I'm ashamed.
comment: I've been stuck in that loop where thinking about the work becomes a weird substitute for actually doing it. Sometimes I have to make the first step ridiculously small, like opening the document and writing one bad sentence, because waiting to feel ready never works. Do you notice if the scrolling happens more when the task feels huge or unclear?
